messages.content: edit:v Alongside my academic pursuits, I have held managerial roles in the industry since 2010. Notably, I have served as the Director for Business Data Analytics, concentrating on data mining and business intelligence projects. Furthermore, I possess valuable managerial experience in IT Management and R&D.

In addition to my academic achievements, I have successfully taken on managerial positions in the industry since 2010. One notable role I held was as the Director for Business Data Analytics, where I focused on leading data mining and business intelligence projects. In this position, I acquired valuable skills in managing teams and overseeing IT management and research and development (R&D) activities.

edit: In parallel to my academic work, I have held various managing positions in different areas in the industry since 2010, including Director for Business Data Analytics (with a focus on data mining and BI), R&D, and IT Management.

In addition to my academic pursuits, I have simultaneously taken on various managerial roles in different areas of the industry since 2010. I have served as a Director for Business Data Analytics, where my primary focus was on data mining and business intelligence projects. I have also gained valuable managerial experience in research and development (R&D) and IT Management.
edit: Please let me know if you need any further information such as my CV.  Thank you very much for your time and consideration.
If you require any additional information, such as my CV, please let me know. I appreciate your time and consideration. Thank you.
EDIT as a subject of an email: Very interested in research work with you

Subject: Expressing Strong Interest in Research Collaboration

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere interest in collaborating with you on research work. I have closely followed your research achievements and find your work aligns perfectly with my academic and professional aspirations.

Having conducted extensive research in [relevant field], I am highly motivated to contribute to the advancement of knowledge in this domain. I believe that our combined expertise and shared research interests could lead to remarkable contributions to the field.

I have attached my CV for your reference, which provides a comprehensive overview of my academic background, research experiences, and notable achievements. I believe my skills and knowledge make me a strong candidate for a collaborative research endeavor.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss potential research opportunities and explore how our collaboration could mutually benefit our respective research goals. I am eager to contribute my skills, enthusiasm, and dedication to a productive research partnership.

Thank you for considering my interest in working alongside you. I am eagerly looking forward to the possibility of joining your esteemed research team. Please let me know if there is any further information or documents that you would like me to provide.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
edit again

Subject: Enthusiastically interested in collaborating on research

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to reach out and express my strong interest in collaborating with you on research. From my extensive research on your work, I am truly inspired by your contributions to the field and believe that our combined expertise and research interests would be highly complementary.

With a background in [relevant field], I have dedicated myself to conducting in-depth research and am driven to contribute to the advancement of knowledge in this area. After reviewing your research and publications, I am confident that a collaborative effort between us would significantly contribute to the field and yield remarkable outcomes.

I have attached my CV for your convenience, which provides a comprehensive overview of my academic background, research experiences, and notable achievements. I believe that my skills and expertise make me a strong candidate for a collaborative research endeavor.

I genuinely appreciate the opportunity to discuss potential research collaborations and explore how our partnership could mutually benefit our research goals. I am fully committed to bringing my skills, enthusiasm, and dedication to this research collaboration.

Thank you for considering my interest in working together. I eagerly await the possibility of joining forces with your esteemed research team. Should you require any further information or documentation, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

sumarize: I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my interest in joining your research group if there are any research positions available, such as a visiting scholar opportunity. I have been impressed by your work in the field of digital health, and I believe that my background and experience align well with your research areas.
Currently, I am serving as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, where I am involved in funded research projects focused on digital health. Specifically, my research pertains to the adoption of digital therapeutics and digital healthcare transformation. As a result of my work, I have made progress on five journal papers, which are currently in development.
In 2015, I obtained my Ph.D. in IT Management from the University of Technology Malaysia, in collaboration with the University of Nebraska, Omaha in the United States. Throughout my academic journey, I have published over 15 papers in peer-reviewed journals and presented more than 25 papers in refereed conferences. My research has encompassed a wide range of areas, including IT-business strategic alignment, IT flexibility, IT capabilities, RBV, customer satisfaction, information systems success, and communication effectiveness. However, my recent interest and industry experience have propelled me further into exploring digital transformation and digital health.
In addition to my research activities, I have been teaching at reputable universities in Iran for over 14 years, especially National University of Iran. I have taught graduate courses in subjects such as Digital Transformation/Governance, Business Intelligence, IT & Entrepreneurship, e-Government, Advanced MIS, Research Methodology, International Business, and Small Business Management. Moreover, I have supervised more than 40 master’s and bachelor’s theses covering various topics within information systems.
Alongside my academic pursuits, I have simultaneously taken on various managerial roles in different areas of the industry since 2010. I have served as a Director for Business Data Analytics, where my primary focus was on data mining and business intelligence projects. I have also gained valuable managerial experience in R&D and IT Management.

I am interested in joining your research group, specifically in a visiting scholar role, if there are any available positions. I have been impressed by your work in the field of digital health and believe that my background and experience align well with your research areas.

Currently, I am working as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, where I am involved in funded research projects focusing on digital health. My research primarily revolves around the adoption of digital therapeutics and the transformation of healthcare through digital means. I have made progress on five journal papers related to these topics.

I completed my Ph.D. in IT Management with a collaboration between the University of Technology Malaysia and the University of Nebraska, Omaha in the United States in 2015. Throughout my academic journey, I have published over 15 papers in peer-reviewed journals and presented more than 25 papers in reputable conferences. My research has covered various subjects such as IT-business strategic alignment, IT flexibility, IT capabilities, RBV, customer satisfaction, information systems success, and communication effectiveness. However, my recent interest and industry experience have led me to focus more on digital transformation and digital health.

Aside from my research activities, I have been teaching at reputable universities in Iran, particularly at the National University of Iran, for over 14 years. I have taught graduate courses on subjects like Digital Transformation/Governance, Business Intelligence, IT & Entrepreneurship, e-Government, Advanced MIS, Research Methodology, International Business, and Small Business Management. Additionally, I have supervised more than 40 master's and bachelor's theses on various information systems topics.

In parallel with my academic pursuits, I have also taken on diverse managerial roles across different industries since 2010. Notably, I have served as Director for Business Data Analytics, concentrating on data mining and business intelligence projects. I have also amassed valuable managerial experience in R&D and IT Management.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of joining your esteemed research group.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
sumarize more :

I am expressing my interest in joining your research group in a visiting scholar capacity, as I find your work in digital health fascinating and believe that my background aligns well with your research areas. Currently, I am working as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, focusing on digital health research projects. I hold a Ph.D. in IT Management from the University of Technology Malaysia and the University of Nebraska, Omaha.

Throughout my academic journey, I have published over 15 papers in respected journals and presented multiple papers at conferences. My research spans topics such as IT-business strategic alignment, IT flexibility, RBV, customer satisfaction, and communication effectiveness. However, my recent focus and industry experience have led me towards digital transformation and digital health.

Apart from research, I have over 14 years of teaching experience at reputable universities in Iran, including the National University of Iran. I have taught graduate courses in Digital Transformation/Governance, Business Intelligence, IT & Entrepreneurship, and other related subjects. Additionally, I have supervised numerous theses on various topics in information systems.

In conjunction with my academic pursuits, I have held managerial roles since 2010, including the position of Director for Business Data Analytics, where I concentrated on data mining and business intelligence projects. I also possess managerial experience in R&D and IT Management.

Thank you for considering my application to join your research group. I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your research endeavors.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

Specifically, my research pertains to the adoption of digital therapeutics and digital healthcare transformation. As a result of my work, I have made progress on five journal papers, which are currently in development.

Currently, I am a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, actively engaged in funded research projects centered around digital health. My research primarily revolves around the adoption of digital therapeutics and the transformation of healthcare through digital means. Notably, I have achieved significant progress in the development of five journal papers directly related to these topics.
